code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_word = false

  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b = match b_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if in_word
        let word = string.substring(line, start, i)
        let wl = string.len(word)
        if wl > best_len
          best_len = wl
          best = word
        end
        in_word = false
      end
    else
      if not in_word
        start = i
        in_word = true
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_word
    let word = string.substring(line, start, n)
    let wl = string.len(word)
    if wl > best_len
      best_len = wl
      best = word
    end
  end

  println("longest=#{best}")
end
